ab: maqe pal’un haipi, dusa’ cak toqas nak munhan Taitu’ tantungu han pantama’un nam.
ch: 這個假日，我和姊姊去台東拜訪我們的叔叔。
en: This holiday, my sister and I went to Taitung to visit my uncle.

ab: minihan cam Mihavaz tundaza’ kisia’ munhan Taitu’.
ch: 我們從水里搭火車去臺東。
en: We took the train from Shuili to Taitung.

ab: kahanin cam Taitu’, ma’unting nga pantama’un lehleh munhan pandu’anlehleh anpasdu zami.
ch: 我們到了台東，叔叔開車來車站接我們。
en: When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

ab: maqa pandu’anlehleh ka nitu daqvisan ni lumaq pantama’un, mahiv ma’unting lehleh ka ka’ita’in.
ch: 車站離叔叔家沒有很遠，開車一下子就到了。
en: The station is not far from my uncle’s house, and it’s just a short drive away.

ab: heza madaing sepukan sinepuk han ngalan lumaq pantama’un, tincuzinsa’ cam mun’ita.
ch: 叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車去那裡。
en: There is a big ranch near my uncle’s house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

ab: han sepukan sinepuk, dasun cam pantama’un nam paka’un sidi tundaza’ uma’.
ch: 在牧場，叔叔帶我們餵羊和騎馬。
en: In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

ab: sanavan’in, muskun cam munhan maci’ ma’un.
ch: 到了晚上，我們一起去市區吃飯。
en: In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

ab: madia lehleh han maci’, pangqa tundaza’ cam utuvai’ mun’ita’.
ch: 市區車子很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
en: There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

ab: matu namudanin na, uka a utuvai’ tangqai’iu’un bunun, muazin cam tunbasu’ mudan.
ch: 要離開的時候，摩托車不見被人偷了，我們只好搭公車離開。
en: When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

ab: hanin cam lopaku Nantu’, nitu qanciap tu kinu’ananin opa ka utuvai’ i pantama’un.
ch: 現在我們回到南投了，不知道叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有。
en: Now that we are back in Nantu, I don’t know if my uncle’s motorcycle has been found.
